data.title: DexCom (NASDAQ: DXCM) reports better-than-expected Q4 results with earnings of 68 cents per share. Stock remained flat in trading.
data.description: In Thursday's after-hours trading, shares of DexCom Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM) remained stable following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company posted earnings of 68 cents per share, surpassing the Street's forecast of 65 cents. For more information, visit Benzinga.com to read the complete story.

data.title: Pan Global files NI 43-101 report for mineral resource estimates at Escacena Project in Spain. TSXV: PGZ, OTCQB: PGZFF, FRA: 2EU.
data.description: Pan Global Resources Inc. (TSXV: PGZ, OTCQB: PGZFF, FRA: 2EU) based in Vancouver, BC, revealed on February 12, 2026, the submission of an independent Technical Report on SEDAR for its Escacena project. This filing marks a significant step for the company in its development process.

data.title: NuriEdge introduces AI coaching platform to help middle managers and teams facing burnout, fatigue; aims to provide executive-level support at scale.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Denver, NuriEdge introduced its AI-driven coaching platform to address the increasing issues of burnout, emotional exhaustion, and retention struggles faced by organizations. The platform is tailored to assist middle managers and their teams in coping with the pressures of their work environment.

data.title: NSG sponsors second webinar on AI and copyright licensing hosted by National Press Foundation.
data.description: A webinar will be held in New York on February 12, 2026, by the National Press Foundation. The event will concentrate on AI Licensing. The Next Solutions Group (NSG), a renowned corporate reputation consultancy, will be hosting this webinar in collaboration with the Copyright Alliance. This will be their second free webinar.

data.title: ProbablyMonsters reveals Crimson Moon, a gothic RPG set in the fallen city of Gildenarch, with intense combat and deep progression.
data.description: An independent video game company in Fort Worth, Texas, ProbablyMonsters, unveiled Crimson Moon, a new Gothic High Renaissance action-adventure RPG. The game features intense, replayable missions combining visceral combat and profound character growth. Playing as a Nephilim - half-human, half-angel, and a Knight of the Crimson Moon dedicated to safeguarding humanity, players will use holy fury and divine powers to reclaim the ruined city of Gildenarch. Gamers have the option to embark on this journey solo or collaboratively.
TRUMP RESCINDS OBAMA-ERA CLIMATE ENDANGERMENT FINDING, ROLLS BACK FEDERAL GREENHOUSE GAS RULES FOR VEHICLES, CLAIMS $1.3 TRILLION IN REGULATORY SAVINGS AS ENVIRONMENTAL GROUPS VOW LEGAL CHALLENGE.

data.title: KBRA gives preliminary ratings to PLYM 2026-IND CMBS securitization with $1.46 billion loan, secured by 145 industrial properties.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to five classes of PLYM 2026-IND, a CMBS single-borrower securitization. The transaction involves a $1.46 billion interest-only mortgage loan with a floating rate. The loan will have an initial two-year term and can be extended three times for one year each, requiring monthly interest-only payments. The borrower's fee simple interests in 145 industrial properties (227 individual buildings) will secure the loan.

data.title: Enhanced and A Paradise Acquisition Corp. filed Form S-4 with SEC, a SPAC merger (NASDAQ: APAD) on Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Enhanced Ltd along with A Paradise Acquisition Corp. revealed the submission of a registration statement on Form S-4. Enhanced, a company based in New York, and A Paradise, a special purpose acquisition company trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol APAD, made the announcement from Hong Kong.
PARAMOUNT IN TALKS TO NOMINATE PENTWATER CEO MATT HALBOWER TO WARNER BROS. DISCOVERY BOARD AS PART OF PROXY FIGHT AIMED AT BLOCKING NETFLIX TAKEOVER BID, FT REPORTS.

data.title: Concentrix Corporation prices $600M senior notes, plans to use proceeds to repay $800M 2026 notes. Offering closes Feb 24.
data.description: Concentrix Corporation, a leading global technology and services provider, has announced the pricing of a public offering of $600 million in 6.500% Senior Notes due 2029. The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering, along with other funds as needed, to redeem or repay a portion of its 6.650% Senior Notes due August 2, 2026, with $800 million outstanding. The closing of the Offering is anticipated on February 24, 2026, pending standard closing procedures.

data.title: Calian Group Ltd. announces voting results from Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Feb 12, 2026 in Ottawa.
data.description: Calian Group Ltd. disclosed the results of the director election voting conducted during its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on February 12, 2026, in Ottawa, Ontario. The process involved shareholders participating in selecting individuals to hold positions on the company's board. The vote outcomes were key indicators of shareholder confidence and direction for the organization.

data.title: CAPREIT announces 2025 Q4 and annual financial results.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, which is a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.2%. This decline indicates a positive trend in the job market, with over 200,000 new jobs created in the last quarter alone. Economists predict that this lower unemployment rate will have a positive impact on the overall economy, boosting consumer spending and GDP growth in the coming months. It is hoped that this trend will continue and lead to further improvements in the job market and overall economic stability.

data.title: Spartacus Acquisition Corp. II closes $230m IPO with 23m units at $10 each, under Nasdaq ticker "TMTSU." Warrants at $11.50.
data.description: Austin, Texas - February 12, 2026 - Today, Spartacus Acquisition Corp. II successfully completed its initial public offering of 23 million units priced at $10.00 each, with 3 million additional units sold due to the underwriters' overallotment option being fully exercised. The units, now trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "TMTSU" since February 11, 2026, consist of one Class A ordinary share and one-third of a redeemable warrant. Each full warrant allows the holder to purchase one share of Class A ordinary stock at $11.50 per share. Following separation, shares of Class A ordinary stock and warrants will trade independently on Nasdaq under the symbols "TMTS" and "TMTSW," respectively, with only complete warrants being exercisable and tradable.

data.title: Brompton Split Banc Corp reveals split of Class A shares and boost in total distributions.
data.description: The latest data shows a decrease in unemployment rates across the nation. The national unemployment rate fell to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This improvement is reflected in both urban and rural areas. However, the total number of unemployed individuals remains high at 6.9 million. Job growth continues to be steady with 344,000 new jobs added last month. The hospitality and retail sectors saw the most significant increase in employment. Despite these positive trends, economists remain cautious about the long-term impact of the ongoing labor market challenges.

data.title: Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. reschedules Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results release to February 27, 2026. Conference call at 8am ET.
data.description: PONTE VEDRA, Florida - Feb. 12, 2026 - Treace Medical Concepts, Inc., a leading medical technology company (NasdaqGS: TMCI), will reveal its financial performance for Q4 and the full year of 2025 on February 27, 2026, before the market opens. Scheduled to commence at 8:00 am ET, a conference call led by company executives will delve into the results.

data.title: Ascot Resources rebrands as Cambria Gold Mines Inc on Feb 13, 2026, trading as "CAMB" on TSXV.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 12, 2026, Ascot Resources Ltd. (TSXV: AOT.H; OTCID: AOTVF) will be changing its name to Cambria Gold Mines Inc. starting February 13, 2026, as per the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia). The company's common shares will start trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the new ticker symbol "CAMB" upon market open.

data.title: Community Healthcare Trust (NYSE: CHCT) raises Q4 dividend to $0.4775 per share; effective December 31, 2025.
data.description: In Franklin, Tennessee on February 12, 2026, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated revealed that its Board of Directors has raised the common stock cash dividend for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The new dividend stands at $0.4775 per share.
